'''Ronay''' was one of the two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]. The moon was home to facilities for testing drives, and was armed. It was not, however, [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]].

[[Toryaz Station]] was located near it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{Mo}}
